subcodes.first_line: His light, through which He illumined the world and made Him the Seal of His Messengers and Prophets, and chose Him from among His servants for the manifestation of His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوره الذی به نور العالم و جعله خاتم رسله و انبیاءه و اصطفاه بین عباده لاظهار امره
